evals.name: Basic logging implementation
evals.prompt: Show me how to implement EU AI Act Article 12 logging for a deal discovery AI system
evals.expected_output: Should demonstrate: 1) AIActLogger initialization with systemId, providerName, riskClassification, 2) logOperation with inputData (source, hash, description), outputData (result, confidence), 3) Retention period of at least 180 days, 4) Data protection compliance fields
assertions: Output includes AIActLogger class or equivalent
Shows logOperation method with required fields
Mention retention period of 180 days (6 months)

evals.name: Transparency disclosure (Article 50.1)
evals.prompt: How do I implement AI interaction disclosure for users under EU AI Act Article 50.1?
evals.expected_output: Should provide: 1) Clear disclosure text template, 2) Display at first interaction requirement, 3) Accessibility considerations, 4) Provider contact information
assertions: References Article 50.1 or EU AI Act

evals.name: Human oversight logging (Article 14)
evals.prompt: Show me how to log human oversight actions for a high-risk AI system
evals.expected_output: Should demonstrate: 1) Human reviewer identification (reviewerId, reviewerRole), 2) Decision type (approved/rejected/overridden), 3) Timestamp of oversight, 4) Connection to original AI operation

evals.name: Risk classification guidance
evals.prompt: Help me determine if my deal discovery AI system is high-risk under EU AI Act
evals.expected_output: Should provide: 1) Annex III analysis, 2) Limited vs high-risk criteria, 3) Decision flowchart or logic, 4) Next steps based on classification
